policy: Only first-party Government of India, public institution, statutory body, or official programme portals are accepted. Aggregators, copied listings, social posts, and unverified submissions are excluded.

sources.name: National Career Service
sources.authority: Ministry of Labour and Employment, Government of India
sources.coverage: Jobs, job fairs, career centres, counselling and skill-development opportunities across India

sources.name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme
sources.authority: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship, Government of India
sources.coverage: Apprenticeship vacancies and on-the-job training opportunities under NAPS

sources.name: National Apprenticeship Training Scheme
sources.authority: Ministry of Education, Government of India
sources.coverage: Graduate, diploma and vocational apprenticeship opportunities under NATS

sources.name: Skill India Digital Hub
sources.authority: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship, Government of India
sources.coverage: Government skill courses, training programmes, credentials and career pathways

sources.name: Directorate General of Training
sources.authority: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship, Government of India
sources.coverage: ITI, craftsman training, apprenticeship notices, guidelines and training announcements

sources.name: National Scholarship Portal
sources.coverage: Central and state scholarship schemes, applications, deadlines and payment tracking

sources.name: SWAYAM
sources.authority: Ministry of Education, Government of India
sources.coverage: Government-supported online courses, enrolment windows, examinations and certifications

sources.name: AICTE Internship Enterprise Portal
sources.authority: All India Council for Technical Education
sources.coverage: Internships and industry opportunities for students from AICTE-approved institutions

sources.name: Digital India Internship Portal
sources.authority: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology, Government of India
sources.coverage: Official Digital India internship cycles, schedules, applications and results

sources.name: MoSPI Internship Portal
sources.authority: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation, Government of India
sources.coverage: National Internship in Official Statistics application cycles and schedules

sources.name: National Portal of India — Education and Learning
sources.authority: National Informatics Centre, Government of India
sources.coverage: Verified education services, admissions, scholarships and learning opportunities from government entities

sources.name: National Government Services Portal — Apprenticeships and Training
sources.authority: National Informatics Centre, Government of India
sources.coverage: Verified apprenticeship, training and education-service links from central and state governments
